'''Nim Zanti''' was an [[Ororo Transportation/Legends|Ororo Transportation]] lieutenant assigned to [[Vergesso Base]] in the [[Vergesso III]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. As the chief Ororo representative, she was the ruler of the Base.<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>
==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Zanti joined Ororo for which she ran [[smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations that turned highly profitable. After years of success, she was rewarded with an assignment to the Vergesso Base. Often advised by [[Weggit Arpor]], she managed to increase the base's profitability, as well as the staff's loyalty.<ref name="guide" />

Ruthlessly efficient, but also notable for using her motherhood instincts over her operations, the base's profitability increased by 10%. Zanti was a practical, ruthless woman with few moral inhibitions; her good treatment towards her underlings and associates sourced from her will to make them efficient. As a result, staff turnover was decreased by 20%. On the other hand, less competent employees were demoted or fired (or promptly executed).<ref name="guide" />

Although not particularly sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], she followed Ororo's policies, and favored them for their contributions to resources.<ref name="guide" />


In the aftermath of the [[battle of the Bajic Shipyards]], Zanti and [[Vam Margan]] happened to be at the [[Base Operations Center]] and survived the disaster in the fortified bunker. Gathering the survivors, they led them through the [[turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] maintenance ladders to the upper levels. Reaching [[the Life]], they were under attack by a [[squad/Legends|squad]] of confused, space-suited mercenaries. Before reaching [[the Facility]], they encountered a squad of [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]].<Ref name="lights">{{WEGCite|story=Will the Last Person Leaving Vergesso Turn Off the Lights?|book=Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide}}</ref>

Making their way to the asteroid surface, they found a [[platoon/Legends|platoon]] of spacetroopers; they managed to steal and hijack their [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttle]], guarded by bored and unexpecting crewmen. As the shuttle was heading to open space, the Imperials realized that something was wrong and sent [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE]]s to destroy it.<Ref name="lights" />
{{Char-stub}}
==Behind the scenes==
The scenario ''[[Will the Last Person Leaving Vergesso Turn Off the Lights?]]'' allows the option to have Vim Zanti and/or Vam Margan among the suvivors of the Battle, that might lead the team of survivors. This article assumes that Zanti had this role.
